summary: Iteration 27 frontend testing completed successfully. All 16 test cases passed. Tested: Brand consistency (header/footer/login logos), Login page responsive layouts (1920px, 768px, 390px), Security by Obscurity (no Admin/Operator terms), Admin redirect to /login, Admin login flow, Mobile menu with floating actions hidden, Cookie banner, Footer with IBAN, Breakpoints (360px, 1024px), 3D Hero canvas.
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedLogin.js correctly uses icon-mark.svg in visual column (line 173)
UnifiedLogin.css uses solid var(--nx-accent) for buttons, not gradient (line 162)
App.js correctly manages mobileMenuOpen state and body class (lines 452, 465-471)
App.css lines 909-910 correctly hide floating actions with visibility:hidden when mobile menu open
Admin.js line 310-318 correctly redirects to /login when no token (Security by Obscurity)
Footer uses .footer-iban class for IBAN display (App.js line 390, App.css line 679)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested all design harmonization features: (1) Brand consistency with icon-mark.svg + NeXifyAI text across header, footer, and login page, (2) Login page two-column layout at 1920px, vertical stack at 768px, compact at 390px, (3) Security by Obscurity - no Admin/Operator/Agenten terms visible on /login, (4) /admin redirects to /login without auth, (5) Admin login flow works correctly, (6) Mobile menu hides floating actions via visibility:hidden, (7) Cookie banner with 'Nur notwendige' and 'Alle akzeptieren', (8) Footer with IBAN using .footer-iban class, (9) Breakpoints 360px and 1024px work correctly, (10) 3D Hero canvas renders.

brand_consistency_header.nexifyai_text: ✅ Present with brand-ai class for AI highlight

login_page_mobile_390px.form_accessible: ✅ Email input and Weiter button visible without scroll
